verses.text: Woe to the foolish prophets who 'follow their own spirit' and have seen nothing. Self-made messengers. Those who speak from their own minds, not God's, lead souls astray.
Woe to the foolish prophets who 'follow their own spirit' and have seen nothing. Self-made messengers. Those who speak from their own minds, not God's, lead souls astray.
Woe to the foolish prophets who 'follow their own spirit' and have seen nothing. Self-made messengers. Those who speak from their own minds, not God's, lead souls astray.
They are like foxes among ruins, seeing 'vanity and lying divination,' saying 'The LORD saith' when He sent them not. Bold falsehood. To put God's name on one's own words is a fearful presumption.
They are like foxes among ruins, seeing 'vanity and lying divination,' saying 'The LORD saith' when He sent them not. Bold falsehood. To put God's name on one's own words is a fearful presumption.
They are like foxes among ruins, seeing 'vanity and lying divination,' saying 'The LORD saith' when He sent them not. Bold falsehood. To put God's name on one's own words is a fearful presumption.
They are like foxes among ruins, seeing 'vanity and lying divination,' saying 'The LORD saith' when He sent them not. Bold falsehood. To put God's name on one's own words is a fearful presumption.

God is against them; His hand shall be on the prophets who see vanity, and they shall not stand in the assembly of His people. Exposed and excluded. False teachers will be cut off from the place they claimed.

God is against them; His hand shall be on the prophets who see vanity, and they shall not stand in the assembly of His people. Exposed and excluded. False teachers will be cut off from the place they claimed.

They seduced the people crying 'Peace' where there was none, building a flimsy wall daubed with 'untempered morter' that must fall. Hollow assurance. Comfort without truth is a wall that collapses in the storm.

They seduced the people crying 'Peace' where there was none, building a flimsy wall daubed with 'untempered morter' that must fall. Hollow assurance. Comfort without truth is a wall that collapses in the storm.

They seduced the people crying 'Peace' where there was none, building a flimsy wall daubed with 'untempered morter' that must fall. Hollow assurance. Comfort without truth is a wall that collapses in the storm.

God will rend it with a stormy wind, and when the wall falls men will ask, 'Where is the daubing?' So His wrath falls on those who prophesied false peace. The cover is stripped away. Lies cannot stand the testing of God's judgment.

God will rend it with a stormy wind, and when the wall falls men will ask, 'Where is the daubing?' So His wrath falls on those who prophesied false peace. The cover is stripped away. Lies cannot stand the testing of God's judgment.

God will rend it with a stormy wind, and when the wall falls men will ask, 'Where is the daubing?' So His wrath falls on those who prophesied false peace. The cover is stripped away. Lies cannot stand the testing of God's judgment.

God will rend it with a stormy wind, and when the wall falls men will ask, 'Where is the daubing?' So His wrath falls on those who prophesied false peace. The cover is stripped away. Lies cannot stand the testing of God's judgment.

He sets His face against the women who prophesy from their own heart, hunting souls 'for handfuls of barley.' Cheap deceit. They trafficked in lies for small gain, destroying the souls they should have saved.

He sets His face against the women who prophesy from their own heart, hunting souls 'for handfuls of barley.' Cheap deceit. They trafficked in lies for small gain, destroying the souls they should have saved.

He sets His face against the women who prophesy from their own heart, hunting souls 'for handfuls of barley.' Cheap deceit. They trafficked in lies for small gain, destroying the souls they should have saved.
God is against their charms; He will tear them and 'let the souls go free that ye hunt.' Captives released. The Lord delivers those ensnared by false religion.
God is against their charms; He will tear them and 'let the souls go free that ye hunt.' Captives released. The Lord delivers those ensnared by false religion.

Because they saddened the righteous with lies and emboldened the wicked, they shall see no more vanity, and God will deliver His people. Justice and rescue. He silences the deceivers and frees the deceived.

Because they saddened the righteous with lies and emboldened the wicked, they shall see no more vanity, and God will deliver His people. Justice and rescue. He silences the deceivers and frees the deceived.
